headline: Google releases Gemini 3.5 Flash with multimodal action capabilities
body: Google launched Gemini 3.5 Flash, a new frontier-class model designed for fast inference across text, image, audio, and video inputs with integrated action capabilities. For healthcare AI implementations, this speed-to-capability ratio directly impacts real-time clinical decision support, faster EHR integration pathways, and reduced latency in radiology or pathology workflows where multimodal analysis is essential. The action capabilities enable direct system integration without intermediate parsing layers, which simplifies deployment for value-based care organizations managing multiple data sources. Healthcare vendors and consultants should evaluate whether 3.5 Flash's performance-per-token economics justify migration from existing Claude or GPT-based pipelines for time-sensitive diagnostic or administrative tasks. Note that Google's CLI tooling will sunset June 18, 2026, requiring teams to plan API migration strategies now if currently dependent on CLI workflows.
